site.title: CreateBlog
site.description: A template-driven starter for personal blogs powered by Markdown and GitHub Pages.

author.name: Lancelot
author.headline: Build a personal blog from templates, then shape it into your own style.
author.bio: CreateBlog starts with opinionated defaults, then lets you tune navigation, tags, accents, layout rhythm, and click effects without leaving your local Markdown workflow.

homepage.heroTitle: Launch your own blog from Markdown.
homepage.heroText: Pick a visual template, tune your navigation and click effects, write posts locally, and publish to GitHub Pages.
